name: mat1_active_cassette
description: Active mating-type cassette mat1 on S. pombe chromosome II. Expressed cassette carrying either mat1-Pi/M (M info) or mat1-Pc/P (P info). The active locus determines haploid cell type and is transcribed; switching is initiated by an imprint-dependent break at the mat1 boundary.
expected_copy_count: 3 cassettes total (mat1 active + mat2-P + mat3-M silent), all on chrII
